digest.greeting: Wednesday, July 8, Jean. Today has 8 active calendar blocks, anchored by the Thiago 1:1, Quality Planning Process, Legal portfolio review, CoE Biweekly Touchpoint, and the renewed Sara 1:1. There are 6 high-value carry-over items, 4 active reminders, and 1 clear approval email. The practical priorities are to turn yesterday's PM and portfolio work into owners, use the Legal and CoE blocks to settle next steps, answer the BA/process question before it splinters across Loop and email, and protect the late-afternoon meeting stack. Teams is rate-limited this morning, so Teams context is intentionally light and the brief leans on Outlook, email, Planner, and dashboard history.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck into one operating structure
items.detail: The PM Team Touchpoint and yesterday's EOD still point to the same need: make the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly deck support one operating rhythm instead of three disconnected places.

items.label: Convert BD portfolio follow-ups into named owners
items.detail: Keep the remaining BD review decisions, blockers, and intake choices visible until each has a clear owner or is intentionally closed.

items.label: Close the Maria and Jhara portfolio-roadblock loop
items.detail: Recent 1:1s used the same portfolio-review pattern. Capture only the roadblocks that still need a named owner or date so the follow-up list does not keep growing.

items.label: Settle the BA request workflow path
items.detail: Janet's workflow notes, today's reminder about BA assignment process, and the Loop task about a BA for Nicolas's Owner and Timestamp project all point to the same decision: define how a BA is requested for a project that already has a PM.

items.label: Close the Levelpath adoption-assessment answer
items.detail: Laura's question from Tuesday still needs either the assessment answer or the owner for that path before the go-live readiness thread fades into background work.

items.label: Resolve Paige's Marketing portfolio-review conflict
items.detail: Paige declined the Marketing portfolio review. Tomorrow's preview still shows the meeting with Paige declined, so decide whether to reschedule or proceed with Lucia and Amy.

items.label: enviar al grupo de PMs las notas de la reunion de ayer
items.detail: Use the morning focus window or the post-Thiago gap to send the PM group the notes while yesterday's discussion is still fresh.

items.label: comenzar testeos de LA AI para change management
items.detail: Start the LA AI change-management testing work before the afternoon meeting stack compresses the day.

items.label: enviar a Eugenia lista de proyectos de los PEs y tambien el SOP template que acordamos como equipo para el nivel de detalle estandard
items.detail: Send Eugenia the PE project list and the agreed SOP template so the expected level of detail is clear before more portfolio reviews land.

items.label: Preguntar a Janet proceso para conseguir BA a un proyecto ya. asignado a un PM
items.detail: Tie this directly to Janet's BA workflow notes and the Nicolas Owner and Timestamp BA ask, so the answer becomes reusable process guidance.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times are shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The morning has usable focus time; the late afternoon is compressed, with the Colombia LOA session overlapping the Legal portfolio review and running into CoE and Sara 1:1.

items.label: Canceled: Bonus Restructure Project - Jean's Support
items.detail: Thiago says the project go/no-go decision moved to next week and he will reschedule once the new date is decided.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: Best early window for PM notes, the Eugenia PE/SOP send, and the BA process question before meetings begin.

items.label: 1:1 Thiago & Jean
items.detail: Use this to confirm whether the Bonus Restructure postponement changes any support work today.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: A 90-minute protected block for follow-ups before the Quality Planning meeting.

items.label: Quality Planning Process
items.detail: Licelot's agenda is to define how PMs determine when Quality needs to be engaged for a new product or process. Bring the decision points, not just the process description.

items.label: Colombia Team Member LOA Information Session
items.detail: HR/Rippling session in Spanish. It overlaps the 3:30 PM Legal portfolio review, so only attend live if Jean needs the Colombia LOA content directly.

items.label: Legal Initial Project Portfolio Review
items.detail: Review active legal portfolio status, risks, blockers, and new intake with Chelsea. Make the outputs owner-based so they can feed tomorrow's portfolio stack cleanly.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint
items.detail: Use the regular CoE block with David, Frank, and Mar to close progress, direction, and open function questions after the Legal review.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: The renewed weekly 1:1 series starts today after an earlier occurrence was canceled. Keep a short list of decisions and blockers from the afternoon stack.

items.label: Use the Legal portfolio review to name owners and blockers
items.detail: Chelsea's review is the main portfolio anchor today. Capture status, risks, blockers, and new intake as owner-based next steps before CoE and Sara 1:1.

items.label: Prepare the Quality engagement decision path
items.detail: The Quality Planning Process meeting is about when Quality needs to be engaged in new products or processes. Bring the decision criteria and any EPMO implications that need agreement.

items.label: Approve or deny Laura Urena's ChatGPT access request
items.detail: Halo ticket 0030960 is waiting for Jean's approval decision for Laura Urena's LLF workspace access. It is marked low urgency, but it is a concrete approval gate.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Planner shows Maria's draft project charter for Mental Health Expansion due today. Confirm whether the draft is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date adjustment.

items.label: Confirm today's impact of the Bonus Restructure postponement
items.detail: Thiago canceled the support block because the go/no-go decision moved to next week. Use the 10:30 AM 1:1 to confirm whether Jean still owes anything before the new date is set.

items.label: Resolve the BA ask for Nicolas's Owner and Timestamp project
items.detail: Microsoft Loop surfaced a task assigned by Jean: a BA is needed for the Owner and Timestamp project from Nicolas. Treat it with the Janet BA-process reminder so the answer becomes reusable.

items.label: Clear or delegate the overdue Rippling task
items.detail: Rippling says Jean has one overdue LLF task. Check whether it is still valid before the LOA information sessions create more HR follow-up noise.

items.label: 1:1 Laura & Jean
items.detail: One-off timing before the recurring series starts next week. Good place to close Levelpath and Laura access context if still open.

items.label: Amazon Connect Weekly Project Sync
items.detail: Agenda includes open items, blockers, prior-week action items, and decisions needed.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Regular BCP/IR touchpoint. Tessa is declined, so confirm whether any incident-guide or survey decisions need async follow-up.

items.label: Marketing Initial Project Portfolio Review
items.detail: Paige is declined while Lucia and Amy are accepted/tentative. Decide whether to proceed or reschedule for Paige coverage.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum for project progress, roadblocks, and strategic coordination.
